description:
Phase 6 of fz-ul4.23. Build the AOT path. Closes fz-ul4.22.

## Deliverables

- New aot driver consuming the backend core (Phase 4), picking ObjectModule.
- Entry-point shim that initializes Runtime (atom table, Process startup) and calls main_entry.
- Link with fz_runtime staticlib + libc; emit native executable.
- `fz build <src.fz> -o <out>` produces a runnable binary.
- Wire up to the fixture matrix as the `aot` path.

## Architectural decisions inherited from fz-ul4.22

- AOT supports concurrency by linking the same runtime.rs / heap.rs the JIT uses.
- main() is `Runtime::new(...).spawn(main).run_until_idle()`.
- Per-Process heap inherited unchanged.

## Acceptance

- `fz build fixtures/add1.fz -o /tmp/add1 && /tmp/add1` exits 0 with the expected stdout.
- `fz build fixtures/concurrency_ping_pong.fz -o /tmp/pp && /tmp/pp` works end-to-end.
- All fixtures whose `# paths:` includes aot pass through the fixture matrix.
- fz-ul4.22 closes.
title: AOT driver on the factored Cranelift core
